title: Senior Frontend Engineer | React | Electron | TypeScript | Medical Systems - Remote
description: Senior FrontEnd Engineer – Medical Devices Leading US chip firm and Turkish partner NavigaAI is looking for a Senior FrontEnd Engineer – Medical Devices to support a 1+ year remote project. The candidate will work with the US chip firm's related department. Paid in USD Location: Remote / Home-based Duration: 1 year (possibility of extension) Eligibility: Turkish citizens Description We are seeking a hands-on Senior Frontend Engineer to build high-performance desktop and web experiences for a regulated medical device platform. Build a cross-platform Electron desktop app and React 18+ web interfaces for an FDA-regulated environment. Work with a modern stack including TypeScript , hooks, and real-time WebSocket data flows for mission-critical applications. Own UI architecture, performance profiling, and security decisions under IEC 62304 compliance frameworks. Collaborate closely with backend, mobile, and UX teams to deliver intuitive, accessible, and safety-critical software. Requirements 5+ years of frontend development experience, specifically in safety-critical, regulated, or high-reliability environments. Expert proficiency in React 18+ and TypeScript (hooks, concurrent rendering, Suspense, and state management like Redux Toolkit). Proven experience designing and shipping production-grade Electron applications. Deep experience with WebSocket integration (connection lifecycle, back-off strategies, and message ordering). Strong command of modern build tooling ( Webpack, esbuild, Turbopack ) and monorepo setups ( Nx, Turborepo ). Solid grasp of frontend security (CSP, XSS/CSRF mitigation, Electron hardening) and observability (Sentry, Chrome DevTools profiling). Strong testing discipline with Jest/Vitest , React Testing Library, and E2E frameworks like Playwright . Working knowledge of accessibility standards ( WCAG 2.1 AA ). Modern Workflow: Advanced proficiency in AI-native engineering practices ; comfortable using LLM-based agents and coding assistants to streamline complex refactoring, debugging, and documentation tasks. Preferred Qualifications Experience in medical device development with working knowledge of IEC 62304 or IEC 62366 . Experience integrating with hardware peripherals (Bluetooth, serial, HID) from a desktop client. Familiarity with advanced profiling (heap snapshots, memory leak diagnosis) and internationalization (i18next). Exposure to streaming protocols beyond WebSocket (SSE, MQTT, or gRPC-Web). To apply, please send your CV to info@navigaai.com with subject line: Senior FrontEnd Engineer.

title: PHP Developer (Remote)
description: Role: PHP Developer Location: Remote Employment Type: Full-time Compensation: Competitive salary commensurate with experience, qualifications, and location. Indicative range: $80,000 – $130,000 (USD equivalent), plus benefits. Role Overview We are hiring a PHP Developer to build and maintain web applications and APIs. The role works in modern PHP frameworks — clean code, sensible architecture, and the discipline to ship reliable software. Key Responsibilities - Build and maintain web applications in modern PHP (Laravel, Symfony, or similar) - Design and implement RESTful APIs and integrations - Work with relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and ORMs - Write clean, well-tested code and contribute to architectural decisions - Diagnose and resolve production issues - Conduct code reviews and contribute to engineering practices Required Skills and Qualifications - 3+ years building production PHP applications - Strong knowledge of Laravel or Symfony - Experience with MySQL or PostgreSQL and ORM patterns - Familiarity with composer, modern PHP standards (PSR), and unit testing - Working knowledge of Git, CI/CD, and Linux environments - Comfort with frontend basics (JavaScript, HTML, CSS) What You'll Bring - Curiosity to dig into systems and turn findings into shipped improvements - Strong written communication and ability to explain technical decisions - A test-and-learn mindset; you ship fast, measure, and iterate - Comfort working asynchronously across time zones What We Offer - Fully remote, flexible work hours - Performance-based bonus structure - Annual learning & development stipend - Health and wellness benefits (varies by location) - Opportunity to work on high-scale, real-world impact projects Equal Opportunity Statement This is an equal opportunity role. Applications are welcomed from all qualified individuals regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions are based solely on qualifications, skills, and demonstrated ability.

title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
description: Ordino, global pazara yönelik mobil uygulamalar geliştiren, ürün odaklı bir yapıdır. Bu pozisyonda, gerçek kullanıcıya ulaşacak ve App Store’da yayınlanabilecek mobil uygulamalar geliştirme sürecinde aktif rol alacaksınız. Bu rol, klasik bir “staj” pozisyonu değildir. Gerçek ürünler üzerinde çalışacak, fikirden MVP’ye uzanan sürecin parçası olacaksınız. Aradığımız Profil Kendi başına ürün geliştirebilen, indie developer mindset’ine sahip Daha önce mobil uygulama geliştirmiş ve tercihen App Store’da yayınlamış Ürün geliştirme mantığını bilen (fikir → kullanıcı → deneyim) UI/UX tarafında hassasiyeti olan Trend uygulamaları takip eden ve analiz edebilen AI araçlarını aktif kullanan ve bunları bir araya getirerek ürün çıkarabilen (örn. Claude, OpenAI API vb.) Sadece araç kullanan değil, bu araçları ürün mantığında birleştirebilen Teknik Beklentiler Swift / Flutter / React Native teknolojilerinden en az birine hakim Aşağıdaki konulara aşina: Onboarding akışları Subscription & paywall sistemleri Firebase veya benzeri analytics yapıları AI entegrasyonu: LLM kullanımı (prompting, temel akış kurma) API entegrasyonu Gerekirse no-code + code hibrit yaklaşım Basit bir fikri hızlıca ürüne dönüştürebilecek pratiklik Başvuru İçin Gerekenler (Zorunlu) Lütfen başvurunuzda aşağıdakileri paylaşınız: info@theordino.com Yayında olan App Store uygulamanızın linkiveya Çalışır durumda bir ürününüzün demo linki (TestFlight vb.) Varsa GitHub profiliniz Sunum (Önemli) Kendinizi ve geliştirdiğiniz uygulamaları anlattığınız kısa bir sunum (PDF / Notion / Drive linki) paylaşmanız beklenmektedir. Bu sunumda: Geliştirdiğiniz uygulamalar Ürün kurgunuz (neden yaptınız, nasıl geliştirdiniz) Kullanıcı deneyimi yaklaşımınız Teknik yaklaşımınız yer almalıdır. Değerlendirme Süreci: Bu pozisyon için CV tek başına yeterli değildir. Başvurular, paylaştığınız uygulamalar ve ürün yaklaşımınızı anlattığınız içerikler üzerinden değerlendirilecektir. AI araçlarını sadece kullanmak değil, bunları birleştirerek gerçek bir ürüne dönüştürebilen adaylar önceliklidir. Ne Sunuyoruz: Gerçek ürün geliştirme deneyimi Global pazara yönelik uygulamalar üzerinde çalışma fırsatı AI destekli projelerde aktif rol Hızlı öğrenme ve üretim odaklı ekip Bugün aramıza katıl.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Job descriptions may display in multiple languages based on your language selection. What We Offer At Magna, you can expect an engaging and dynamic environment where you can help to develop industry-leading automotive technologies. We invest in our employees, providing them with the support and resources they need to succeed. As a member of our global team, you can expect exciting, varied responsibilities as well as a wide range of development prospects. Because we believe that your career path should be as unique as you are. Group Summary The Magna Exteriors portfolio of products includes access systems such as liftgates, exterior trim, modular systems, front-end modules including fascia, active aerodynamic systems and other lightweight structural components for automotive, commercial truck and other industrial markets. Recognized globally as an innovator in all aspects of vehicle exteriors, Magna provides everything needed, from materials development and design through manufacturing and assembly, to help automakers create sleek, state-of-the-art vehicles across the world. Job Responsibilities Job Description: Develop web applications covering both frontend and backend, Build mobile applications for iOS and Android, preferably using React Native or Flutter, Design and develop REST API services, Build microservice or modular service architectures, Develop real-time data processing, data synchronization, and integration processes, Integrate with systems such as ERP, MES, IoT devices, and similar platforms, Develop barcode and QR-based operational applications, Build dashboards, reporting, and monitoring screens, Prepare Docker container structures and manage them on Linux servers, Configure and use Nginx, systemd, and similar service structures, Develop in line with GitLab CI/CD pipeline processes; support automated syntax checks, builds, Docker image creation, server deployment, and go-live flows, Implement logging, monitoring, and basic performance tracking, Develop AI services, local AI systems, or LLM-based applications when needed. Qualifications Proficiency in Python and/or JavaScript; hands-on experience with backend frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, or Node.js), frontend (React or Next.js), and mobile development (React Native, Flutter, or native), Experience with relational databases (MSSQL, PostgreSQL, or SQLite) and data access layers, Hands-on experience with Docker and Linux; familiarity with Nginx and basic service management, Solid understanding of REST APIs, microservice architecture, and data integration concepts, Experience with GitLab CI/CD pipelines including build, containerization, and deployment flows, Familiarity with message brokers (Redis, RabbitMQ, or Kafka) and authentication standards (OAuth2, JWT, or AD integration), Basic exposure to monitoring and logging tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK, Good command of verbal and written English, Experience with LLM integrations, local AI systems, or vector databases is a plus, Experience with IoT, shopfloor, or real-time production systems is a plus, Ability to work independently, take ownership, and deliver working solutions. Awareness, Unity, Empowerment At Magna, we believe that a diverse workforce is critical to our success. That’s why we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We hire on the basis of experience and qualifications, and in consideration of job requirements, regardless of, in particular, color, ancestry, religion, gender, origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability or gender identity. Magna takes the privacy of your personal information seriously. We discourage you from sending applications via email or traditional mail to comply with GDPR requirements and your local Data Privacy Law. AI-Assisted Screening Disclosure As part of our commitment to a fair, consistent, and efficient recruitment process, we may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to assist in the initial screening of applications submitted through our Workday system. These tools help identify qualifications and experience that align with the role requirements. Please note that AI is used solely to support our recruiters. Final decisions are always made by the hiring manager and the hiring team. Importantly, no applicant data is shared externally through these AI tools. All information remains securely within our systems and is handled in accordance with our privacy and data protection policies. Under conditions defined by applicable law, you may have the right to request an explanation of how AI is used to support decision-making. If you have any questions or concerns about this process, feel free to contact our Talent Attraction team. Worker Type Regular / Permanent Group Magna Exteriors
